scripts.dev: pnpm -r --parallel --stream --filter openbase-auth-client --filter open-learning-tools-api-client --filter openbase-ui --filter open-learning-tools-web run dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter open-learning-tools-api-client generate-client && pnpm --filter openbase-auth-client build && pnpm --filter open-learning-tools-api-client build && pnpm --filter openbase-ui build && pnpm --filter open-learning-tools-web build
